message:
feat: port activation functions and comparison ops across runtime stack (bd-3cx5, bd-1ngn)

Add relu/sigmoid/tanh activation functions with full autograd backward
rules and eq/ne/lt/gt/le/ge comparison operators as non-differentiable
ops across all four crates (kernel, dispatch, autograd, api).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
